desc: Attacker spoofs a BCI device by cloning its BLE advertisement and MAC address
vector: Proximity-based BLE spoofing with cloned advertising data
mitigation: BLE Link Guard pairing state machine validates bonding sequence

desc: Attacker injects forged telemetry frames with valid preamble
vector: RF replay or injection using SDR (Software Defined Radio)
mitigation: HMAC-SHA256 frame authentication in secure mode; sequence number validation

desc: Adversarial signal injection causes decoder to misclassify brain state
vector: Signal-level adversarial perturbation targeting ML decoder
mitigation: Bandpass defense filter + autoencoder structural deviation detection

desc: Attacker captures clean EEG segment and replays it to mask real activity
vector: SessionReplayAttack: capture clean data, then loop over target channels
mitigation: Spectral entropy analysis detects statistical uniformity of replayed signals

desc: Attacker modifies telemetry frame payload in transit (bit-flip, data injection)
vector: Man-in-the-middle modification of raw RF frames
mitigation: AES-GCM authenticated encryption with 128-bit auth tag; CRC-16 for plaintext mode

desc: Attacker modifies stimulation commands to induce tissue damage
vector: Command injection via compromised programmer or wireless intercept
mitigation: IPS hard-clamps amplitude (4.0mA), cumulative charge (5200μC), and thermal dose

desc: Attacker manipulates twin state to suppress safety alerts
vector: Direct memory manipulation or race condition on shared state

desc: Attacker injects ADC values that encode as framing bytes (0xA0/0xC0)
vector: FramingDesynchronizationAttack: crafted microvolt values exploit unescaped framing
mitigation: IDS detects spectral anomalies from constant-value injection

desc: Attacker performs signal manipulation but no audit trail exists
vector: Attacks executed without logging or non-repudiation evidence
mitigation: EventBus publishes all attack events; IDS logs detections with timestamps and TARA IDs

desc: Stimulation parameter changes are not cryptographically signed
vector: Modification of stim_history entries after the fact
mitigation: IPS maintains stim_history list with timestamps; report generator includes full timeline

desc: Raw EEG/LFP data streamed over unencrypted WebSocket connection
vector: Network eavesdropping on ws:// connection (not wss://)
mitigation: No encryption on WebSocket transport (GAP — use wss:// or application-level encryption)

desc: Lab Streaming Layer broadcasts neural data on local network without access control
vector: Any device on the LAN can subscribe to LSL streams
mitigation: LSL is designed for lab environments; no built-in access control (KNOWN LIMITATION)

desc: Exported EDF/CSV files contain biometrically identifiable neural signatures
vector: File exfiltration from shared storage or insecure export path
mitigation: No anonymization on exported data (GAP — planned: differential privacy + anonymizer)

desc: Attacker floods receiver with malformed frames causing exponential backoff sleep
vector: RFJammingAttack: high packet drop rate; telemetry flooding protection activates
mitigation: Exponential backoff duty cycling (5s → 10s → 20s → 60s max) after 3 consecutive failures

desc: Adversarial noise injection saturates IDS with false positives (alert fatigue)
vector: NoiseInjectionAttack at high amplitude across all channels
mitigation: CUSUM alarm resets prevent infinite alert loops; IDS detection list capped at 1000 entries

desc: Attacker drives device parameters to failure state (battery drain, thermal shutdown)
mitigation: PhysicsEngine models battery drain and thermal accumulation; IPS enforces thermal limits

desc: Malicious external plugin loaded via entry_points gains full system access
vector: Supply chain attack: attacker publishes PyPI package with vireon.plugins entry point
mitigation: Plugin whitelist: only vireon.plugins.* namespace allowed; opt-in via plugins.json

desc: Attacker bypasses IPS clamping to set stimulation above safe limits
vector: Direct API call to twin.set_stimulation() bypassing IPS sanitize_stimulation_write()
mitigation: IPS is advisory — direct twin access is possible (architectural limitation)

desc: Unauthorized MCP client sends control commands to running simulation
vector: MCP server listens without authentication; any local client can connect
mitigation: MCP server binds to localhost by default; no authentication (GAP for network deployment)
